```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-cap: Beta distribution.
# Packages
library(ggplot2)

# Plot
ggplot2::ggplot(data.frame(x = c(0, 1)), aes(x)) +
  ggplot2::stat_function(
    fun = dbeta, args = list(shape1 = 2, shape2 = 5),
    aes(color = "α=2, β=5"),  linewidth = 1
  ) +
  ggplot2::stat_function(
    fun = dbeta, args = list(shape1 = 5, shape2 = 2),
    aes(color = "α=5, β=2"),  linewidth = 1
  ) +
  ggplot2::stat_function(
    fun = dbeta, args = list(shape1 = 2, shape2 = 2),
    aes(color = "α=2, β=2"),  linewidth = 1
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(color = "Parameters") +
  ggplot2::ylab("Density") +
  ggplot2::xlab("x") +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
